entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop grown in arid and semi-arid regions, characterized by specific growth habits.

entities.name: ARID AND SEMI-ARID REGIONS
entities.description: The environmental regions where pigeonpea is primarily grown.

entities.name: LOTUS
entities.description: A legume species used for comparison with pigeonpea.

entities.name: MEDICAGO
entities.description: A legume species used for comparison with pigeonpea.

entities.name: GLYCINE
entities.description: A legume species used for comparison with pigeonpea.

entities.name: GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: An important agronomic trait in pigeonpea that can be determinate or indeterminate.

entities.name: PHENOTYPE
entities.description: The observable physical properties of an organism, analyzed to identify mutations affecting growth habit.

entities.name: DEVELOPMENTAL REGULATION
entities.description: The biological process governing growth and development in pigeonpea.

entities.name: GENOTYPING BY SEQUENCING
entities.description: A high-throughput sequencing method used to construct genetic maps.

entities.name: GENETIC MAP
entities.description: A representation of the relative positions of genes and markers on a chromosome.

entities.name: F2 MAPPING POPULATION
entities.description: A second-generation filial population used for genetic mapping, derived from crossing ICP 5529 and ICP 11605.

entities.name: ICP 5529
entities.description: A pigeonpea parent line used to derive the F2 mapping population.

entities.name: ICP 11605
entities.description: A pigeonpea parent line used to derive the F2 mapping population.

entities.name: INDETERMINATE GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: A growth habit in pigeonpea that exhibits dominance over the determinate habit.

entities.name: DETERMINATE GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: A growth habit in pigeonpea that is recessive to the indeterminate habit.

entities.name: SNP MARKERS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphism markers used for genetic mapping.

entities.name: DT1 LOCUS
entities.description: A genetic locus mapped on CcLG03 that contributes significantly to growth habit phenotypic variations.

entities.name: CCLG03
entities.description: The linkage group (chromosome) where the Dt1 locus is located.

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC VARIATIONS
entities.description: The observable differences in growth habit traits within the pigeonpea population.

entities.name: QTL ANALYSIS
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Locus analysis used to identify candidate genes for specific traits.

entities.name: CCTFL1
entities.description: A candidate gene for determinacy in pigeonpea.

entities.name: INDEL MARKER
entities.description: An insertion-deletion marker derived from the CcTFL1 gene that co-segregates with the Dt1 locus.
